message:
Add live Redis conformance tests for SORT commands

Add CORE_SORT_LIVE_STABLE_CASES constant with 34 test cases covering:
- Numeric sorting (ASC/DESC/explicit)
- LIMIT clause with various edge cases
- Alpha sorting
- Missing key and WRONGTYPE error handling
- SORT_RO variants
- Case-insensitive option parsing
- Invalid argument error cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
